steps.title: Set off the renaming phrase
steps.content: The phrase the first woman to serve in that role renames Susana Martinez. Because the sentence already closes that phrase with an em dash before took office, it needs an opening em dash after the name.

steps.title: Match the closing dash
steps.content: A opens with a comma, B opens with a colon, and C has no punctuation, so none matches the closing em dash. The answer is D.
